automating deployments with Terraform, YAML, and PowerShell.
Deployed and managed containerized applications using Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) for scalable and resilient microservices architecture.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines to automate AKS deployments using Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions.
Configured node pools, autoscaling, and resource limits in AKS to optimize performance and cost.
Integrated AKS with Azure Monitor and Log Analytics for real-time observability and diagnostics.
Managed AKS networking with Azure CNI, Ingress controllers, and private cluster configurations for secure access.
Automated multi-subscription management in Azure Classic Portal using PowerShell scripts and publish settings files.
Created and managed Azure Active Directory (Azure AD) users via Azure Portal and PowerShell for seamless identity and access management.
Integrated Azure Monitor and Log Analytics to enhance real-time monitoring, troubleshooting, and performance optimization for Kubernetes workloads.
Designed and implemented reusable Terraform modules for provisioning infrastructure across multiple environments, ensuring consistency and scalability.
repository triggers a Jenkins build pipeline automatically.
Automated infrastructure deployment in Azure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) principles with Terraform, including resource groups, virtual networks, and storage accounts.
Maintained and Version controlled Terraform scripts to track and manage infrastructure changes.

Conducted reviews and improvements for Terraform scripts to optimize infrastructure deployment and ensure alignment with organizational best practices.

Automated application scaling and resource allocation by configuring Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscalers (HPA).
